terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to Migozz, the first social ecosystem powered by artificial intelligence. By accessing or using our services, you agree to comply with the following terms and conditions.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: By registering, accessing or using Migozz, you accept these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, you should not use the platform.

section2.title: 2. Service Description
section2.content: Migozz allows users to connect multiple social networks, cross-post content, monetize their digital presence, receive gifts, and access AI-powered analytics tools.

section3.title: 3. Eligibility
section3.content: You must be at least 13 years old to use Migozz. If you are a minor, you need the consent of your parents or legal guardians.

section4.title: 4. Acceptable Use
section4.content:
You may not use Migozz to:

• Post illegal, offensive, or third-party infringing content.
• Impersonate identities or manipulate statistics.
• Engage in fraudulent or deceptive activities.

section5.title: 5. Intellectual Property
section5.content: All content generated by Migozz, including designs, algorithms and features, is the property of Migozz Inc. Users retain rights to the content they upload but grant Migozz a license to display and distribute it within the ecosystem.

section6.title: 6. Monetization and Payments
section6.content: Revenue generated from advertising, gifts or content sales is subject to fees set by Migozz. Payments are processed securely and may be subject to local taxes.

section7.title: 7. Account Suspension and Termination
section7.content: Migozz reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms, without prior notice. Users may delete their account at any time from the settings panel.

section8.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
section8.content: Migozz is not responsible for loss of income, service interruptions, or damages resulting from use of the platform.

section9.title: 9. Changes
section9.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Updates will be posted on this page and will be effective upon publication.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Migozz, we value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This policy describes how we collect, use, store and share your information.

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.content:
• Registration data: name, email, phone number.
• Connected social networks: follower stats, posts, interactions.
• Usage information: in-app activity, clicks, session time.
• Monetization data: generated revenue, gifts received, transactions.

section2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
section2.content:
• To personalize your experience on Migozz.
• To display analytics and insights about your community.
• To enable cross-posting and monetization.
• To send you relevant notifications and provide technical support.

section3.title: 3. Sharing Information
section3.content:
We do not sell your data. We may share information with:

• Service providers (such as payment processors).
• Legal authorities if required by law.
• Strategic partners, only with your consent.

section4.title: 4. Security
section4.content: We use encryption, authentication and secure servers to protect your information. However, no system is 100% foolproof.

section5.title: 5. Your Rights
section5.content:
• Access your data.
• Rectify incorrect information.
• Delete your account and data.
• Request a copy of your information.

section6.title: 6. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
section6.content: We use cookies to improve user experience, analyze traffic and personalize content. You can manage your preferences from your browser.

section7.title: 7. Data Retention
section7.content: We retain your information while your account is active or as necessary to comply with legal obligations.

section8.title: 8. Policy Changes
section8.content: We may update this policy periodically. We will notify you of significant changes by email or within the platform.

dataDeletion.title: Data Deletion Instructions
dataDeletion.intro: If you want to delete your personal data from Migozz, follow the instructions below.

section1.title: 1. Scope
section1.content: These instructions apply to the information collected by Migozz through Facebook Login and other Meta integrations, including: public name, user ID, profile picture, email (if authorized), and any additional permissions you granted to the app.

section3.title: 3. What happens next
section3.content:
• We will confirm receipt within 48–72 hours.
• We will complete deletion or anonymization within a maximum of 30 days.
• You will receive a confirmation once the process is finished.

section4.title: 4. Deletion scope
section4.content:
We delete data obtained through Facebook Login and data generated during your use of Migozz (profiles, sessions, preferences, content not subject to legal obligations).

Certain minimal records may be retained temporarily for:
• Legal compliance
• Fraud/abuse prevention
• Accounting/tax obligations
• Defense against claims

These records are securely stored and deleted once the obligation expires.

option1.title: From your account
option1.description: Go to Profile > Settings > Privacy > Delete my account and data, or visit https://migozz.com/account/delete and follow the on-screen steps.

option2.title: Web form
option2.description: Fill out the form at https://migozz.com/legal/data-deletion providing your email and the ID you used to register (if you know it).

option3.title: Email request
option3.description: Write to privacy@migozz.com with the subject "Delete my data – Migozz" using the same email linked to your account.

warning.title: ⚠️ Effects
warning.content: Deletion is irreversible and may result in deactivation or closure of your account and loss of access to your content or related features.
